economic_notes: Tsal'alh Development Corp and subsidiaries (TDC-IVL Contracting Ltd., TDC Contract Management Corp., Sisxets Property Management Corp., Crane's Landing RV Park Corp., Lil'Tem' Mountain Hotel Corp.) and Tsal'alh Development Limited Partnership and subsidiaries accounted for by modified equity method. TDC not in compliance with BMO borrowing agreement covenants. COVID-19 impacted operations with increased government funding and social assistance costs. Committed to construction of four new houses for Band Members.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2021 (not 2024). Audit report signed May 29, 2023 — approximately two years after year-end, which is highly unusual. One consolidated subsidiary (Tsal'alhmec Holding Corp.). Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (Tsal'alh Development Corp and Tsal'alh Development Limited Partnership, each with multiple subsidiaries). TDC has negative equity of -$5,662,282 and is in breach of BMO loan covenants; Tsal'alh has guaranteed approximately $11.3M in TDC debt. expenses_housing combines Band Owned Housing ($163,392) and CMHC Housing ($401,419). expenses_enterprises is Economic Development ($380,169). Lands and Resources expenses ($214,475) not mapped to a standard category. Prior year includes a $509,396 change in accounting for subsidiaries and $12,593,752 change in net financial assets from change in accounting for subsidiaries. total_government_transfers = ISC $4,012,645 + FNHA $1,017,645 + Province of BC $337,478 + CMHC $323,718 = $5,691,486. osr = $7,561,985 - $5,691,486 = $1,870,499 (includes Other revenue, BC Hydro, Rental income, Own source revenue, Investment income, Interest income, less loss from Nation business entities).
